_comment: Class of 2026 team wall, rendered left-to-right in registration order. Add registered teams here as they confirm — append to the end so order reflects registration sequence. Each team needs: name, club, division. Clubs supply a crest at registration; set 'crest' to its image path (e.g. images/clubs/<club>.png). If 'crest' is omitted, the cell falls back to the club's initials. The page fills remaining cells (up to maxVisible) with placeholder 'open spot' tiles.
